Ran-b..personality: A highly sensitive, irritable individual who is easily excitable and prone to quarrelsomeness. They resemble the broken-down state of chronic invalids—weak, tottering, and deeply reactive to environmental changes. There is a marked susceptibility to fright and vexation, with a constitution that has been worn down by prolonged suffering or excess.
Ran-b..mental_state: Confusion of mind predominates, with vertigo triggered by cold air and a peculiar sensation of enlargement of the head. The mental faculties are dulled and besotted, particularly in cases of prolonged alcohol use, with a tendency toward epileptiform episodes and sudden fainting weakness.
Ran-b..emotional_pattern: Deep depression of spirits with an active desire to die characterizes the core emotional state. There is a pronounced fear of ghosts and an underlying irritability that easily escalates into quarrelsomeness. The emotional pattern reflects a person who is both frightened and combative—reacting to their suffering with alternating despair and agitation.
